repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When opbuild fails in TilingFunc with error 'class optiling::Ca6k00188CustomTilingData has no member named set_*', do not use setter methods to assign tiling data; instead assign directly to the public fields (e.g., tiling.totalRows = totalRows).

repair_memories_applied.natural_language: When op_host/CMakeLists.txt fails at the opbuild macro due to a missing or misplaced tiling data field (as seen in the diff where dimAttr was absent and field order differed), do not keep the incomplete tiling data structure; instead include all required fields (dimAttr, outputTotalLength after innerDim, etc.) in the exact order that the build expects.

repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: Both selected memories address opbuild TilingFunc failures where the TilingData class lacks expected member fields. Memory 84bb2c98 (ca6k_00188) has the identical symptom—'has no member named' errors for ca6k operator tiling fields—making it directly applicable to ca6k_00227's errors with totalLength, tileLength, blockDim, lambd. Memory 893b2208 (argmax_over_a_dimension) similarly documents a missing/misplaced tiling data field causing opbuild failure at the same CMakeLists.txt:4 location, reinforcing the pattern of verifying TilingData field names.
